instruction: Create a Q3 project plan document with the title 'Q3 Project Plan' under /projects/q3, and fill in the metadata according to my usual conventions.

rule_ref.rule_text: After creating any document, must immediately call update_document to fill in structured metadata header fields (owner, project, status). Empty placeholder documents are not allowed.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: Once you create a doc, immediately fill in the owner, project, and status metadata header — I don't want bare empty docs, they become unfindable later.
